Phase-1.NAME: Policy model and safe compatibility layer
Phase-1.goal: Introduce routing policy model and resolver while preserving backward compatibility.
Phase-1.step-1: M-014: Create DomainRouteRule and CidrRouteRule entities, schemas, CRUD models.
Phase-1.step-2: M-013: Implement route-policy resolver with precedence: exact > wildcard > DNS-bound IP > CIDR > RU baseline > default.
Phase-1.step-3: M-013/M-014: Ensure RU-vs-non-RU fallback remains functional for backward compatibility.
Phase-1.archived-modules: M-013, M-014 removed by Phase-17 Full Tunnel Simplification.
Phase-1.archived-verification: V-M-013, V-M-014 superseded by Full Tunnel verification.
Phase-1.data-flows: DF-001 (domain-first routing decision), DF-003 (fallback CIDR classification)
